description_long: This is a small, single-engine airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a low-wing configuration. The exterior is primarily white with blue accents along the fuselage, wingtips, and tail, giving it a modern and clean appearance. The cockpit is enclosed with large side windows, suggesting good visibility for the pilot and passengers. The landing gear is of the tricycle type, with two main wheels under the wings and a nose wheel under the front fuselage. The tail features a conventional design with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The propeller is mounted at the nose, indicating a piston engine typical of general aviation aircraft.
description: A small, white and blue low-wing airplane with a single nose-mounted propeller, tricycle landing gear, and an enclosed cockpit. Features a conventional tail and streamlined design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, cockpit windows, low-mounted wings, and the tail's blue accent.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the nose-mounted propeller, tricycle landing gear, and the full wingspan.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the fuselage, cockpit, and tail, mirroring the features of view 0.
description_view_3: Rear-front angled view showing the propeller, cockpit, and the symmetry of the wings and landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with slight dihedral and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel, fixed configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with large side windows, likely single or dual seat.
